conference.name: Optimized AI Conference 2026
conference.description: An affordable, hands-on AI conference designed for students, professionals, and executives alike. Gain real skills, practical strategies, and tools you can use immediately.

aesthetic.direction: Dark-mode tech editorial with geometric energy
aesthetic.description: Vercel-inspired dark UI meets conference energy. High contrast dramatic type scale on dark surfaces, structured grids with bold section transitions, and clean whitespace within sections paired with dense content grids for speakers and workshops. The design projects authority and technical credibility without feeling corporate or sterile.
anti_patterns: Low contrast text on dark backgrounds
Cluttered layouts with no breathing room

display_font.rationale: Geometric, modern, clean but distinctive. Strong presence at large sizes without feeling generic.

body_font.rationale: Excellent readability at body sizes, professional warmth, pairs well with geometric display type.

primary.name: OAI Orange
primary.usage: Primary CTAs, key accent, active states

secondary.name: OAI Teal
secondary.usage: Secondary accent, links, badges, success states

accent_gradient.usage: Hero accents, decorative lines, special highlights

effects.border_glow_gradient: 1px solid transparent with linear-gradient(135deg, #FF6B35, #00D4AA) on border-image

components.name: Navbar
components.description: Sticky top navigation with logo, nav links, and CTA button. Transparent on hero, gains dark surface background on scroll.
components.figma_notes: Build as component set with 2 variants. Auto-layout horizontal, space-between. Logo left, links center, CTA right.

components.name: Button
components.description: Multi-variant button component used for CTAs, form submissions, and navigation actions.
components.figma_notes: Component set with 4 variants x 2 states (default, hover). Auto-layout horizontal, centered content.

components.name: Footer
components.description: Full-width dark footer with logo, navigation columns, social links, newsletter signup, and copyright.
components.figma_notes: Auto-layout vertical. Top row: 4-column grid. Bottom row: copyright bar. Padding 64px vertical, 80px horizontal.

components.name: SpeakerCard
components.description: Speaker photo with name, role, and company. Used in homepage featured speakers and full speakers grid.
components.figma_notes: Auto-layout vertical, gap 12. Image placeholder rect with rounded corners. Name, role, company stacked below.

components.name: WorkshopCard
components.description: Workshop preview card with title, speaker, short description, duration badge, and detail link.
components.figma_notes: Auto-layout vertical, gap 16. Badge top-right. Title, speaker, description, CTA button stacked.

components.name: TicketCard
components.description: Pricing card for ticket tiers. Features tier name, price, included items, and purchase CTA.

default.featured_variant: border uses accent gradient, subtle glow

components.figma_notes: Auto-layout vertical, gap 24. Overline tier label, large price, feature list with checkmarks, CTA button at bottom.

components.name: TestimonialCard
components.description: Speaker testimonial with quote text, speaker name, title, and optional photo.

default.accent: orange quote mark or left border accent

components.figma_notes: Auto-layout vertical, gap 16. Large opening quote mark in orange, quote text, then speaker name/title row at bottom.

components.name: SectionHeader
components.description: Reusable section header with overline label, heading, and optional subheading. Used to introduce each major page section.

default.alignment: left or center depending on section

components.figma_notes: Auto-layout vertical, gap 16. Overline text, heading, optional paragraph. Text alignment as property.

components.name: EventDetailBlock
components.description: Structured block for event logistics: date, time, venue, address. Uses icon + text rows.
components.figma_notes: Auto-layout vertical, gap 20. Each row: icon (24x24 rect placeholder) + label/value column.

components.name: FormField
components.description: Input field component for contact and signup forms.
components.figma_notes: Component set with 3 variants. Auto-layout vertical: label on top, input below. Focus state variant shows orange border.

components.name: Badge
components.description: Small label component for tags, categories, durations, and status indicators.

default.variations: orange text for highlight, teal text for default, neutral for muted

components.figma_notes: Auto-layout horizontal, centered. Pill shape. Small text with generous horizontal padding.

components.name: ScheduleRow
components.description: Single row in the program schedule showing time, talk title, and speaker name.
components.figma_notes: Auto-layout horizontal, space-between. Time column fixed width, title/speaker fills remaining space.

components.name: HeroSection
components.description: Page hero with large headline, subheadline, date/location badge, and CTA buttons. Dark background with subtle gradient or geometric accent.

home.background_accent: subtle diagonal gradient lines or geometric shapes in orange/teal at low opacity

components.figma_notes: Full width frame. Content centered vertically. Decorative elements as low-opacity rectangles or lines.

sections.name: Hero
sections.description: Full-viewport hero with conference name, tagline, date/location badge, and dual CTA buttons (Register + View Workshops). Subtle geometric accent shapes.

sections.name: Free Tickets & Discounts
sections.description: 3-column grid: Decision Makers (free), Repost Discount (25%), Volunteer (free). Each card with icon placeholder, title, short description.

sections.name: Workshops Preview
sections.description: Section header + 2-column grid of 6 featured workshop cards (of 11 total). Each card: title, speaker, short desc, duration badge, Details CTA. View All Workshops button below grid.

sections.name: Featured Speakers
sections.description: Section header + 4-column grid of 8 featured speaker cards. Each card: photo placeholder, name, role, company. View All Speakers CTA.

sections.name: Ticket Tiers
sections.description: Section header + 3-column layout of ticket cards: Student ($100), Lite Pass ($250), Full ($400). Full Pass highlighted with gradient border. Each card: tier name, price, feature list, Register CTA.

sections.name: Testimonials
sections.description: Section header + 3-column testimonial cards. Quote text, speaker name, title. Orange accent quote marks.

sections.name: Schedule Preview
sections.description: Section header with Day 1/Day 2 tab-like layout. Schedule rows for virtual event times. View Full Program CTA.

sections.name: Sponsors & Partners
sections.description: Section header + logo grid for sponsor tiers (Platinum, Gold, Silver, Bronze). Placeholder rectangles for logos. Companies Represented list.

sections.name: Venue & Hotel
sections.description: Event detail block with date, time, location, address. Map placeholder rectangle. Nearby hotels mention.

sections.name: Footer
sections.description: Full footer with logo, 4-column navigation, social links, newsletter email input, copyright.

chunks.description: Outer page frame (1440x6800), inner scrollable frame, all 10 section container frames with backgrounds. No content yet, just the structural skeleton.

Hero section content: H1 'Architecting Agentic AI Systems', date/location badge, subheadline paragraph, two CTA buttons (Register, View Workshops), decorative geometric accent shapes (low-opacity gradient rects).
Discounts section + Workshops Preview section. Discount: section header + 3 cards (Decision Makers, Repost, Volunteer). Workshops: section header + 6 workshop cards in 2-col grid, View All button.
Featured Speakers section: section header, 4x2 grid of 8 speaker cards (photo placeholder rect, name, role, company each), View All Speakers CTA button.

Ticket Tiers section: section header, 3 ticket cards (Student $100, Lite $250, Full $400). Each card: overline tier, price H2, feature list with checkmark icons, Register CTA. Full pass gets gradient border.
Testimonials section: section header, 3 testimonial cards (Paige Bailey, Sebastian Raschka, Mike Tamir). Quote text, large orange quote mark, speaker name/title.
Schedule Preview section: section header, Day 1/Day 2 visual tabs, 10-12 schedule rows with time + talk title + speaker. View Full Program CTA.

Sponsors & Partners section + Venue section + Footer. Sponsors: header + tier labels + logo placeholder grid. Venue: event detail block + map placeholder. Footer: logo, 4-col nav, social icons, newsletter input, copyright.

prototype_links.description: All planned prototype navigation links. Each entry maps a source element to a target page frame.

navbar_links.description: Present on every built page. 7 navigation targets.

workshop_detail_cross_links.description: Each workshop detail page has an 'Other Workshops' section linking to 3-4 sibling detail pages.

footer_links.description: Present on every built page. Links to main content pages.

build_order.description: Recommended build sequence. Design system first, then pages by complexity and dependency.

phases.name: Design System & Components
tasks: Create Figma variables for colors, spacing, radii
Create text styles for full typography scale
Build component set: Button (4 variants x 2 states)

phases.name: Homepage
phases.notes: Most complex page. Build first to validate design system. All sections exercise different component types.

phases.name: Core Content Pages
phases.notes: Content-heavy pages that exercise speaker grid, workshop cards, and schedule components.

phases.name: Workshop Detail Pages
phases.notes: Shared template. Build agent-retrieval first as reference, then duplicate pattern for others.

phases.name: Event & Utility Pages
phases.notes: Simpler pages using established components. Quick builds.

phases.name: Link-Only Placeholders
phases.notes: Minimal placeholders so all prototype links resolve.

phases.name: Prototype Wiring
tasks: Wire all navbar links on every page
Wire all footer links on every page
Wire homepage CTAs (register, workshops, speakers, program)
Wire homepage workshop cards to detail pages
Wire homepage ticket card CTAs to registration
Wire workshops page cards to detail pages
